mnemonics.title: CLOS Components
mnemonics.content: CLOS = Crossbar Links Optimize Scalability (Remember: CLOS CrossLinks Over Spine)

mnemonics.title: VXLAN Port
mnemonics.content: VXLAN uses UDP port 4789 - Think '4-7-8-9' as 'For Getting Packets Through'

mnemonics.title: RoCE Layers
mnemonics.content: RoCE Requirements: RDMAs Over Converged Ethernet (Layer 2 = RoCEv1, Layer 3 = RoCEv2)

acronyms.usage: Switch architecture in data center racks

visualTips.visualization: Imagine spine switches as vertical backbone, leaf switches as horizontal branches connecting servers
Picture original Ethernet frame wrapped in UDP/IP header with VXLAN header like an envelope

analogies.analogy: Like a woven textile where each thread (link) contributes to overall strength and flexibility
Similar to sudden rush of cars merging onto highway causing temporary traffic jam
